description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to update apt caches and install nodejs and npm with `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq nodejs npm`. Define a single job named pages (using the default stage) that only runs on the master branch, changes directory into `public` and executes `npm install`. The job should publish the `public` directory as an artifact. No custom Docker image or services are specified, so the runner's default image is used.
